name: Background Beams
summary: An elegant background effect featuring soft, animated light beams that create depth and atmospheric visual interest for hero sections and key content areas.
detailedDescription: The Background Beams component creates a sophisticated atmospheric effect through softly glowing light beams that animate subtly across the background. This component adds visual depth and polish without overwhelming foreground content, making it ideal for hero sections, landing pages, and premium UI contexts. The beams feature gentle gradients that fade at the edges, creating a natural, organic appearance reminiscent of light filtering through space. Animation is slow and meditative, with beams drifting lazily to create a sense of calm motion that enhances rather than distracts. The effect uses CSS-based animations for smooth performance, maintaining 60fps playback even on mid-range devices. Color customization allows matching to brand palettes while preserving the ethereal, luminous quality. Multiple beam layers can be configured for varying density and visual complexity. Perfect for SaaS products, creative portfolios, or any context where adding subtle motion and atmospheric depth elevates the user experience. The component works particularly well in dark mode where the luminous beams create striking contrast against dark backgrounds.
purpose: Add subtle atmospheric depth to hero sections and landing pages
Create visual interest through gentle, meditative motion
Enhance perceived quality and polish of modern interfaces
Provide dynamic backgrounds that don't compete with foreground content
Support dark mode designs with luminous, glowing effects
behavior: Animates multiple light beams with slow, continuous drifting motion
Applies soft gradient fades at beam edges for natural appearance
Loops seamlessly without visible breaks or animation resets
Maintains smooth 60fps performance through CSS-based animations
Supports color customization for brand-specific styling
Configurable beam density and animation speed
Scales responsively to different viewport sizes
visualCharacteristics: Soft, glowing light beams with gradient edges
Slow, meditative animation creating calm atmosphere
Luminous quality particularly effective in dark contexts
Subtle depth perception through layered beam arrangement
Clean, modern aesthetic suitable for premium interfaces
Customizable color palettes maintaining ethereal appearance
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Use as a supporting atmospheric layer rather than the primary layout structure.
